ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 has been Shipped
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart. Your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way. The estimated delivery date is 3-5 working days.

Items:
- 1x Wireless Earbuds (Black)
- 1x Phone Case – Glitter

If you have any questions, contact our support.

Thank you for choosing Flipkart!

Best,
Flipkart Team

spam.subject: Congratulations! Scholarship Award for 2025-2026
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! Aapko National Merit Scholarship ke liye shortlist kiya gaya hai. Aapke academics aur extracurriculars ko dhyan me rakhte hue, hum aapko ye prestigious award dene ke liye khush hain.

To claim your scholarship, please verify your account details and complete the enrollment process by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please note: Failure to respond within 48 hours will result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Best regards,
Scholarship Office
University of Excellence
